_meta.purpose: Content bank for GENESIS carousel generation — hooks, pain points, CTAs, captions
_meta.rule: All content must accurately represent PRPath features. No invented features.

score_rank_hooks: Can you hit World Class on {exercise}?

listicle_topics.title: 5 reasons you're stuck at the same weight
slides: You don't remember last week's numbers
You're not tracking progressive overload
Your rest times are all over the place
You never deload when you should
You're guessing instead of measuring

listicle_topics.title: 4 signs you're actually getting stronger
slides: The weight that crushed you last month feels light
You're adding reps before adding weight
Your warm-up sets feel like nothing
You stopped dreading certain exercises

listicle_topics.title: 3 mistakes killing your bench progress
slides: You bench the same weight every Monday
You skip tracking so you forget what worked
You never check if you're actually progressing
listicle_topics.cta: PRPath tracks it all for you

listicle_topics.title: Why your friend is stronger than you
slides: They track every single set
They know their exact numbers from last week
They follow progressive overload religiously
They don't guess — they measure

listicle_topics.title: 6 things strong people track that you don't
slides: Total volume per muscle group
Their strength score over time
Rest time between sets
Which muscles are lagging
Personal records for every exercise
Weekly training consistency

listicle_topics.title: The #1 reason beginners quit after 3 months
slides: They can't see their progress
Without tracking, every session feels the same
No numbers = no proof you're improving
Your brain needs to SEE the gains

relatable_hooks: POV: It's chest day and all benches are taken
When someone asks to work in on your last set
The gym at 5 AM vs 5 PM
Nobody talks about how lonely the gym is at 6 AM
I don't feel like going to the gym today
When your gym crush sees you fail a rep
Leg day tomorrow means stairs are the enemy
That one guy who never reracks the weights
The difference between 1 year and 3 years of lifting
nutrition_hooks: Food swaps that won't kill your gains
What 40g of protein actually looks like
Stop eating this if you want to build muscle
The meal that changed my cut
What I eat in a day (bulking edition)
